category_sources: Official GNOME documentation describes librsvg as a library to render SVG files.
source_facts.description says librsvg renders SVG files using Cairo.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME project pages use the name librsvg/LibRsvg.
docs_sources: Official API docs list the source as gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/librsvg.
Official GNOME Pages site provides librsvg API documentation and development documentation.
repo_sources: Official GNOME API docs list https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/librsvg/ as the source repository.
Official development docs state librsvg's main source repository is at gitlab.gnome.org.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official GNOME docs identify librsvg as part of GNOME graphics infrastructure.
source_facts.description identifies SVG rendering with Cairo.
